_provenance: Names + key_ability match WebApp/starfinder-tool/frontend/src/lib/sfCalc.js SKILLS exactly (SF1e Core Rulebook pg. 20, 20 skills). `slug` is a new convention introduced here (lowercase, spaces -> underscore) for use as bonus[].value in alternate_traits, e.g. race.schema.json's bonusEffect — the one reference file (human.json) only ever used single-word skill slugs ("culture", "disguise", "perception"), so this extends that same convention to multi-word names consistently.
notes: Profession's key ability isn't actually fixed by the rules -- it varies per the specific profession chosen at character creation (Profession (Merchant) might key off Int, Profession (Diplomat) off Cha, etc). key_ability here is "wis" only because that's the app's own default fallback (see sfCalc.js comment) -- don't treat it as authoritative for Profession specifically.
